Henry Ward - AI Consultant

      1-1 Build single-page Jekyll marketing website

      Back to task list

      Description

      Create the initial production-ready single-page website for Henry Ward using Jekyll and GitHub Pages, including AI service offerings, business benefits, and a Calendly booking CTA placeholder.

      Status History

      Timestamp Event Type From Status To Status Details User
      2026-04-01 09:08:00 Status Change N/A Proposed Task file created. GitHub Copilot
      2026-04-01 09:09:00 Status Change Proposed Agreed User approved implementation start. henry
      2026-04-01 09:10:00 Status Change Agreed InProgress Implementation in progress. GitHub Copilot
      2026-04-01 09:22:00 Status Change InProgress Review Implementation completed and submitted for review. GitHub Copilot
      2026-04-01 20:20:00 Status Change Review InProgress Resumed task to resolve diagnostics from generated output and re-verify end-to-end. GitHub Copilot
      2026-04-01 20:58:00 Status Change InProgress Review Diagnostics fixes completed and end-to-end verification passed. GitHub Copilot

      Requirements

      • Configure GitHub Pages-ready Jekyll setup.
      • Deliver a single-page layout with clear B2B messaging.
      • List popular AI engineering services and specific business benefits.
      • Include placeholder Calendly booking embed.
      • Ensure responsive behavior for desktop and mobile.

      Implementation Plan

      1. Add Jekyll config and dependencies.
      2. Create single-page content structure in index.md.
      3. Add custom styling to align with professional corporate direction.
      4. Add local run instructions and project documentation.
      5. Validate file state and prepare for review.

      Test Plan

      • Verify Jekyll configuration contains required remote theme and plugin settings.
      • Verify page includes services, products, business benefits, and booking CTA sections.
      • Verify CSS includes responsive Calendly sizing rules for smaller screens.
      • Verify placeholder Calendly URL appears in both config and page embed.

      Verification

      • Completed: Config and dependency files created.
      • Completed: Site content includes all required sections.
      • Completed: Styles applied for professional look and mobile support.
      • Completed: Project ready for GitHub Pages publish.
      • Completed: Bundler installed in local environment and available in active shell.
      • Completed: Local build command bundle exec jekyll build completed with exit code 0.
      • Completed: Generated artifact /_site/index.html exists.
      • Completed: Built HTML includes key sections and placeholder Calendly URL.

      Files Modified

      • .gitignore
      • Gemfile
      • Gemfile.lock
      • _config.yml
      • index.md
      • assets/css/main.scss
      • .vscode/settings.json
      • README.md
